incidentList.subtitleManage: Manage and follow up on safety, OHS, and bullying reports.
incidentList.subtitleMine: Track the status of the incident reports you submitted.
incidentList.loadError: Failed to load the incident list
incidentList.ownOnlyNote: You can only view reports that you created yourself.

incidentDetail.loadError: Failed to load the report details
incidentDetail.resolutionRequired: Resolution notes are required when marking a report as Resolved
incidentDetail.title: Incident Report Details
incidentDetail.resolutionPlaceholder: Describe the actions taken to resolve this incident...
incidentDetail.internalNoteLabel: Internal note (not visible to the reporter)

incidentReport.submitError: Something went wrong while submitting the report
incidentReport.successBody: Thank you for reporting this event. Your report is invaluable in keeping the clinical environment safe and supportive for everyone.
incidentReport.pageSubtitle: Form for reporting student safety, patient safety, OHS, bullying, or ethical violation incidents in the clinical academic environment.
incidentReport.confidentialNotice: Your report will be handled confidentially. If you choose the Anonymous Report option, your identity is not recorded in the database and cannot be seen by anyone, including Admins.
incidentReport.previewNotice: Preview mode. This is how the form looks to students/reporters based on the current configuration. Inputs are disabled in this mode.
incidentReport.detailDesc: Describe the event as truthfully and completely as possible.
incidentReport.locationPlaceholder: e.g. ER on-call room RSUP Dr. Sardjito, Dahlia Ward, etc.
incidentReport.involvedPlaceholder: Name/role of the people involved (if known)
incidentReport.chronologyPlaceholder: Describe the event clearly (who, what happened, and how) — at least 20 characters
incidentReport.anonHint: Your name will not be included in this report. The report is fully anonymous.
incidentReport.selectTypeFirst: Please choose an incident type first.
incidentReport.step1Subtitle: Choose the type of incident you want to report. The form adapts to the incident type you select.
incidentReport.step1Notice: Your report will be handled confidentially. The anonymity option is available inside the report form (if the template supports it).
incidentReport.step1PreviewNotice: Preview mode. This shows how a reporter picks the incident type before filling in the full form.
incidentReport.step1CardDesc: Pick the category that best matches the event.
incidentReport.dynPreviewNotice: Preview mode. This is the form as the reporter will see it. Inputs are disabled.
incidentReport.dynSuccessBody: Thank you for your report. It will be handled confidentially and professionally in line with the applicable procedure.

incidentConfigure.loadError: Failed to load the incident form configuration
incidentConfigure.validationNameCode: Every item must have a name and a code (value).
incidentConfigure.title: Incident Form Configuration
incidentConfigure.subtitle: Set incident types, severity levels, attachment rules, and notifications. Changes immediately affect the form reporters see.
incidentConfigure.typesEditorDesc: Options shown in the 'Incident Type' dropdown. Deactivate (rather than delete) old items so past reports stay consistent.
incidentConfigure.severitiesEditorDesc: Options shown in the 'Severity Level' dropdown.
incidentConfigure.rulesDesc: Applies to all new incident reports.
incidentConfigure.allowedTypesHint: Separate with commas, no spaces. Example: jpg,png,pdf
incidentConfigure.autoNotifyHint: Send a notification immediately when a report with critical severity arrives.
incidentConfigure.recipientsDesc: Parties who receive notifications (email & in-app) whenever a new incident report arrives. Managed centrally by the Super Admin under System Settings → SMTP (Email) → Notification Matrix to stay consistent with other modules.
incidentConfigure.noRoles: No roles assigned yet — report notifications are not being sent to anyone.
incidentConfigure.previewCardDesc: Save the configuration first so the preview reflects the latest changes.

incidentStatistics.title: Incident Statistics
incidentStatistics.subtitle: Summary and trend of incident reporting over the last 30 days.
incidentStatistics.trendDesc: Number of incident reports per day
incidentStatistics.trendEmpty: No reports in the last 30 days.

incidentConsult.title: Confidential Consultation
incidentConsult.subtitle: Share your concerns, questions, or requests for help confidentially with the authorized team. Consultations can be submitted anonymously.
incidentConsult.successBody: We have received your consultation request. The reply will appear under My Consultation History below, and you will be notified by email (if not anonymous).
incidentConsult.infoNotice: This consultation is confidential. The responding team consists of the assigned Study Program Admin or Head of Study Program. If you choose Anonymous, your identity is not recorded — but the reply cannot be linked back to you.
incidentConsult.detailDesc: Describe what you want to consult about in as much detail as possible so we can respond appropriately.
incidentConsult.topicPlaceholder: e.g. Question about the rotation schedule, Issue with a preceptor, etc.
incidentConsult.messagePlaceholder: Describe in detail what you want to consult about — at least 20 characters...
incidentConsult.anonHint: Your name will not be included. Note: anonymous consultations will not appear in your History because they are not linked to your account.
incidentConsult.historyEmpty: You have not submitted any consultations yet (anonymous consultations are not shown here).
incidentConsult.processingReply: Your consultation is being processed. The reply will appear here.

incidentConsultations.loadError: Failed to load the consultation list
incidentConsultations.title: Consultation Management
incidentConsultations.subtitle: Manage and respond to consultation requests from students and the academic community.
